# Aix En Provence

> Geotechnical engineering company in France, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amelioration](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/amelioration/)
- [Analyse Damplification Sismique](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/analyse-damplification-sismique/)
- [Analyse Lerosion Sols](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/analyse-lerosion-sols/)
- [Analyse Stabilite Pentes](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/analyse-stabilite-pentes/)
- [Analyse Tassements](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/analyse-tassements/)
- [Caracterisation Sols Residuels](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/caracterisation-sols-residuels/)
- [Cisaillement Au Scissometre Chantier](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/cisaillement-au-scissometre-chantier/)
- [Conception Chaussees Rigides](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-chaussees-rigides/)
- [Conception Colonnes Ballastees](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-colonnes-ballastees/)
- [Conception Fondations Parasismiques](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-fondations-parasismiques/)
- [Conception Fondations Pieux](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-fondations-pieux/)
- [Conception Fondations Superficielles](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-fondations-superficielles/)
- [Conception Jet Grouting](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-jet-grouting/)
- [Conception Micropieux](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-micropieux/)
- [Conception Murs Soutenement](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-murs-soutenement/)
- [Conception Parois Moulees](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-parois-moulees/)
- [Conception Pieux Battus](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-pieux-battus/)
- [Conception Radier General](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-radier-general/)
- [Conception Vibrocompactage](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/conception-vibrocompactage/)
- [Drainage Routier Geotechnique](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/drainage-routier-geotechnique/)
- [Essais In Situ](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/essais-in-situ/)
- [Etude Mecanique Sols](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/etude-mecanique-sols/)
- [Evaluation Glissements Terrain](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/evaluation-glissements-terrain/)
- [Exploration](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/exploration/)
- [Fondations](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/fondations/)
- [Fondations Remblais](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/fondations-remblais/)
- [Geophysique](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/geophysique/)
- [Geotechnique Routiere](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/geotechnique-routiere/)

- [Microzonage Sismique](https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/microzonage-sismique/)

## Contact
- Website: https://aix-en-provence.geotechnique.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in France.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
